entry.title: New IDC W31P4Q07A0015 awarded to INTUITIVE RESEARCH AND TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADMINISTRATIVE BPA FOR NEW TASK ORDER

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: NOT SUBJECT TO ECONOMY ACT DUE TO USE OF GSA SCHEDULES.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
